summary: The representative #60777 is obsolete because it is already closed. The live canonical path is the still-open linked issue #57256. Current main still lacks the live-gateway memory runtime/provider fallback requested by #57256, and all useful contributor PRs in this cluster are closed and uneditable, so the safe autonomous path is a narrow replacement fix PR that preserves contributor credit.
